name: tesla-invoice-fetcher
description: Fetch and manage Tesla invoices from Fleet API

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/client && npm run build -w packages/server
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/server && npm run test -w packages/client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/server && npm run lint -w packages/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/server && npm run typecheck -w packages/client
